examples: She was expensively dressed, with fine furs and jewels.
There are other restaurants where you can eat less expensively.
One of the great problems of modern childhood is ADHD, now increasingly and expensively treated with drugs.
It's a question prompted by the opening of the expensively refurbished Royal Museum of Scotland.
In other words, the big will get bigger and charge more for their expensively procured spectacles.
